titleStmt.title: SII 29.31: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 31. (A.R. No. 26 of 1961-62.) JAṬAPRŌLE, KOLLAPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar now lying in front of the Vēṇugōpālasvāmy temple.

It refers to the rule of emperor Trailōkyamalla ruling from the capital Kalyāṇa and to mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chiddana-Chōḷa governing Pāḍakal-800, Naḷavāḍi-500, Āyaṁje-300 and Kanne-300. Also it refers to a royal lady named Mahādēvi who is described as dvitiya-Lakshmī samāne (may be the wife of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chiddana-Chōḷa).
It records a gift of land to Lakuḷēśvara-āchārya, the disciple of Jagadindu-paṇḍita of Baḷagarānūru. The grant was probably made by Kumārapaya.
The record is a bit damaged and incomplete. It is dated Śaka 985 Śōbhakrit, Phālguṇa, śu. 2 Sunday. It corresponds to 1064 A.D., February 22, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya
śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārāja
dhirāja paramēśvaraṁ parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
mat traiḷōkyamalladēvara
vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārka tāraṁbara salū
ttamire kalyāṇada nele
vīḍinoḷu tha(ta)tpāda padmō
pajīvi caraṇa sirōru
(da)ṁ(di)hataviḷōcana śrīḷō
cana pramukhā śrī pṛthvī
sva(śva)ra kārita kovaḷitira kali
kāla kularatna pradīpa
kaṁ kumataraṁ kulamalā
yyana siṁga kāṁcipu
ra tripura saṁhāraṇa kā
raṇa mahēśvaraṁ śrī ma
t ciddanacōḷa mā(ma)hā
rājaru kannemūnūṟu
mapāḍakalleṁṭunūṟuma
naḷavāḍi maiyanūṟu
māyaṁje (ā) mūnū
ṟumaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭa
(pra)tipālana geydu
(rā)jyaṁgeyuttamire

(paramēśvara)
śrī ma
nmahāmaṇḍaḷē
śvara
kalya
tma dayāsa
dvitīya lakṣmī
samāneyaru
mappa(be)ḍaṁga mahā
(dēvi) baḷiyara ho
(pa) vinayadi
ra ttara dēvara
saṁpannarappa śrīma
tu baḷagarānūra jaga
diṁdu paṁṇḍitara si(śi)ṣya
rappa lakuḷēśvarā
cāryyage sakavarṣa
985 neya śōbhakru
tsavatsarada phālguṇa
sudda bidige Ādivā
radaṁdu śrī matkumā
ra(pa) yaru ni
sagarōda kammadvaraja
daṁ dā
rasamunnūṟā ba(ṁ)
ḷiya ṟa ma(ḷva)vi
vihalu
rppārma (bi)yapa(®pa)
poḷa (kka)
mmāḍi biṭadu ya(ni)
le mā 2 rippattu
Digital edition of SII 29.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
